title: Add a highlighted description or tag near the board name
excerpt: It would be great if I can add a highlighted description or a tag near the board name. For example, I want the users to know if a board is “Confidential” so it would be great to addd this in a bold, red tag near the boar…

posts.author: adila (Adi)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if I can add a highlighted description or a tag near the board name. For example, I want the users to know if a board is “Confidential” so it would be great to addd this in a bold, red tag near the board’s name.
